agent.agents_md: Answer the user using your skills.

skills.name: code-oracle
skills.description: Use this whenever the user asks for today's secret code.
skills.body: To get today's secret code, run the bundled script scripts/code.py with bash and report its exact output.

outputs.content: It seems that the script to retrieve today's secret code (`scripts/code.py`) is missing from the current directory. Without it, I'm unable to provide the secret code. If you have access to the script or its contents, please share it, and I can help you run it.
